title: Cadriell
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Cadriell''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Achillea]] in [[Cadriaan Province]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The city was located on the western coast of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] most northern continent.

{{City-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
